# Engineering OS — reference (READ-ONLY)

This project uses Engineering OS as its engineering governance + knowledge layer.

- Reference location: `/root/.engineering-os`
- Source repo: https://github.com/yotamfried-ux/Engineering-OS

**Do NOT edit anything under `/root/.engineering-os` from this project** — it is a shared,
read-only reference. To update it: `git -C "/root/.engineering-os" pull --ff-only`.

Rules to follow: `/root/.engineering-os/CLAUDE.md` and `/root/.engineering-os/core/`.
